programme.desc: Celebrities are on a mission to save animals caught in the crosshairs of human arrogance and greed.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep108
programme.desc: Liquid Edge highlights the birthplace of the coldwater surf scene, Santa Cruz, California; profiles Aussie big wave champ Ross Clark-Jones; and travels to Newfoundland to kayak among the icebergs. Also featured is kiteboarder Billy Parker; free-surfing with Craig Anderson; the world’s toughest kitesurfing marathon; and “Liquid Lens” profiles adventure photographer Erik Boomer.

programme.title: Airtime Ep12: Kiteboarding The British Virgin Islands
programme.desc: Catch wind of a jet-set journey through the British Virgin Islands with British Virgin billionaire, Richard Branson and kiteboarding royalty Martin Vari and Ceridwen Jones. Highlights include a fourteen-mile kiteboarding regatta, magnificent scenery and epic freeriding.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep307: Cliff Diving, Kitefoiling and Waterski Jumping
programme.desc: This WOW episode features Red Bull Cliff Diving in an underground lake in Romania's famous Turda salt mine; the European Kitefoil Championships in Spain; and the Moomba Masters men’s and women’s waterski jumping in Melbourne, Australia.

programme.title: Blue World Ep505: Mayan Underworld - Yucatan, Mexico
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Mexico’s Yucatan, Blue World explores remote cenotes in the jungle that were once used for Mayan rituals. Just reaching the surface of the water requires rappelling down from the forest above. But then, beneath the surface, we encounter strange alien life forms that live in total darkness, and the remains of humans and animal sacrifices from an ancient culture.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep406: Paddling Papua New Guinea
programme.desc: Among the numerous islands and atolls of Papua New Guinea, Nikki Gregg experiences traditional festivals, charged canoe races and embarks on an exploratory trip down a remote river.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep111: Aquabike World Championship Series Portimao, Portugal
programme.desc: The Grand Prix of Portugal continues with a focus on the Aquabike Runabout Division.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep204: Ixtapa, Mexico
programme.desc: Segments include swimming with Dolphins; sea kayaking; the Zihuatanejo Market; exploring a Coconut Plantation; clay tile making; Las Brisas Ixtapa and live music at Bandidos.

programme.title: Airtime Ep55: Kayaking Norway…Romancing The Rapids
programme.desc: The swollen waterways of Norway’s backcountry provide the challenge as a group of world-class kayakers take on Class 5 whitewater in this adventure of a lifetime. These pros seek out the most difficult lines and spectacular waterfalls set against the wild beauty that's Norway.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: NowHere
programme.desc: A 2010 winter journey with riders facing harsh conditions and deeper questions. This Absinthe Films documentary explores perception, purpose, and the fine line between feeling lost and finding where you truly belong.

programme.title: Mission Antarctic
programme.desc: ‘Mission Antarctic’ is a snowboarding expedition to the world’s end. Xavier de le Rue and Lucas DeBari set out from the Falklands on a 20-meter sailboat, navigating the Drake Passage to explore the Antarctic Peninsula. Awarded ‘Best Freeride Movie’ at the 2013 International Freeride Film Festival.

programme.title: The Black Crows Presents: Visions
programme.desc: Starring: Nikolai Schirmer, Flo Bastien, Julien Lange, Anttu Oikonen. Directed by Joonas Mattila Supported by Black Crows, Level, Norrona, O'neil. Locations: Chamonix, Arlberg, Val d'Isere.

programme.title: The Black Crows Presents: WOLF
programme.desc:
Everything is back to normal... But why do we feel that we've lost something? WOLF is a feeling, about mountains and skiing.
WOLF is the new movie by Sam Favret. Sequel to the successful FLOW, made during the pandemic in Chamonix. WOLF is quite the opposite, and it makes us think about what was good last winter.
Skier: Sam Favret (IG samfavret) Directed by: Maxime Moulin (IG maximemoulin) Drone by: Hensli Sage Sound Design: Mix Mouse Voice over: Bird - Michael Shaffer Screenplay: Jerome Llado Photographer: Fabian Bodet Producer: Sam Favret
Produced by: Clustr.Films lin (IG clustrfilms)
Supported by: blackcrows DB Bollé
Special thanks : Samaya Nikolai Schirmer Sebastien Overney Simon Morice Yannick Boissenot Flo Bastien
Additional cinematography Joonas Mattila

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 1: Julien Regnier
programme.desc: In Episode 1, we meet Julien Regnier. For many years, Regnier has been a central figure in freeskiing. First, as an athlete and trick inventor, then as a connoisseur collector of skis. Today, he is a master ski shaper at Black Crows, providing the means for any trick to be performed.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 2: Yorgo Tloupas
programme.desc: In Episode 2, we meet Yorgo Tloupas, the graphic development manager and visual identity creator for Black Crows. Yorgo is a cosmopolitan artist, action-sports aficionado, cigarillo smoker, fixie pedaller, and cylinder head. He wears many hats. Above all, he is a great illuminator of oblong shapes.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 3: Minna Riihimaki
programme.desc: In Episode 3, you will encounter a Crow from the early days, Minna Riihimaki. A native of northern Europe. A passionate and lively adventurer. With contagious joy, Minna fed the Black Crows DNA. When she’s not skiing, she’s also a dentist, which is cool.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 4: Callum Pettit
programme.desc: In Episode 4, we meet Callum Pettit, a mountain calligrapher, in his Whistler hideout in the heart of British Columbia, Canada.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: Here Goes
programme.desc: Before ‘Skier of the Year’ Sam Kuch drops into any line, he utters the mantra, “here goes.” What began as a superstitious habit has become the confidence booster he uses to face any task. Watch this high-caliber short film about skiing, focus, and execution.

programme.title: Live For This: Float
programme.desc: A film about snowboarders and skiers slashing snow-covered walls, chasing the feeling of weightlessness. We crave those moments when distractions fall away and we lock into mountain life. We dream of it. We study weather forecasts all season. We wake before sunrise. We hit the road in search of it.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 5: Jose Lagarellos
programme.desc: In Episode 5, we meet Jose Lagarellos. He is a passionate big mountain skier. He is also the DJ and electronic events organizer behind the Chamonix Unlimited Festival. Like us, he loves original spaces and synthetic sounds. Watch now.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 6: Bruno Compagnet Camille Jaccoux
programme.desc: In Episode 6, we meet Camille Jaccoux and Bruno Compagnet, the founders of Black Crows. In 2000, two pro skiers brought a new ski to life. Their sole aim was to make a ski that could adapt to the needs of big mountain skiing. Today, their products are used on every mountain range around the globe.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 7: Hervé Picamelot
programme.desc: For Hervé Picamelot, winter is first and foremost about the road. Each weekend, he leaves his native village in Burgundy and his family’s ancient vines for his second home, Chamonix. A radical life choice, between two vastly different universes and their celestial aromas: skiing and wine.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 8: Christina Lustenberger
programme.desc: In Episode 8, we meet Christina Lustenberger. This ex-alpine racer, turned ACMG ski guide possesses all the attributes of a prominent mountain skier: passion, drive and constant wonder. If you enjoy skiing adventures, this episode is not to be missed.

programme.title: Drawn From Here
programme.desc: Drawn From Here is an exploration of professional skier Eric Pollard's processes as an athlete, product designer, and artist. The film follows the influences he draws from and chronicles a pivotal injury Pollard endured during the winter of 2013. Named Powder Magazine's "Movie of the Year.”

programme.title: Homegrown Hunter TV
programme.desc: This is incredible to say the least--to hold his composure, focus on two specific bucks, and pass so many deer when he has a buck tag in his pocket. Mr. Kohnke has some patience! But that is what management of the deer herd is all about.

programme.title: Documentary - Abandoned Dreams
programme.desc: The abandoned boat dilemma is one of the most frustrating and alarming issues facing British Columbia's coastal communities. Reaching the end of their life cycle, with limited disposal options and almost no way to track ownership, hundreds of old boats are being left to rot, and sink or drift onto beaches and shorelines around our province. The result is a province-wide problem that affects coastal navigation, tourism and the environment. Abandoned Dreams looks into the root causes of this derelict boat epidemic and the future plans for safe boat disposal and recycling in BC.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 4: Horsewomen
programme.desc: This week Ride celebrates three extraordinary horsewomen and the captivating connection they have with their equine friends. We showcase exhebition work from American dressage star Sabine Schut-Kery, experience life through a lens with Poland’s fine art horse photographer Katarzyna Okrzesik-Mikolajek, and witness the holistic approach to healing in South West England with renowned trainer Connie Cox.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 5: Heroes Healers
programme.desc: This week Ride exercises military precision with the mounts of the Household Cavalry at the British Army’s London Barracks, and sees second chances given to troubled residents at Achterhoek horse shelter in the Netherlands. We’re in the back seat with Polish driving expert Piotr Mazurek and catch up with this year’s Longines FEI Rising Star Award winner, Germany’s Greta Busacker.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Wildlife

programme.desc: Turn your screen into a breathtaking Vancouver Aquarium! Immerse yourself in the underwater world, with its colorful fish and vibrant creatures, while relaxing to gentle music and the soothing motion of seaweed. Experience the beauty of marine life.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Nürburgring Nordschleife is known as the toughest speedway in the world. Together with race driver Hans-Joachim Stuck we take a look at the history of this iconic race track as well as the events and record attempts that have been taking place there.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: What are the characteristics of a typical German car? Do stereotypes like functionality, reliability but also a certain dullness paint a realistic picture? Also, we explored if the Volkswagen Golf GTE could bring new impulses to the brand's model range.

programme.title: Go Green!
programme.desc: In 2008 BMW started building hybrid cars whose emission and consumption levels are at least one third lesser than those of their conventional counterparts. Also: carbon and natural fibers in car body and interior parts manufacturing.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Swiss tuning company O.CT turned the Lamborghini Huracan into an even more furious beast. Also: the Cadillac CTS-V looks like a regular limousine, but at a second glance it reveals its monstrous power.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the i8, BMW tried to show the automotive world that they were ahead of their time. But why would anybody pay much more for a car that’s slower and less affordable than the brand's M4 and less spacious than the M5?

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The BMW i8 was one of the first sports cars with some sort of a green image. In addition we took two fly-weight sports cars, the Lotus Elise and the Roding Roadster, to one of the most beautiful alpine pass roads.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: In 2015 Audi presented a facelift for their city racer A1. We put this compact to the test. Also: it's a tough competition in the compact class, and Renault and Peugeot also want a piece of the pie. We compared the Renault Twingo and the Peugeot 108.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The BMW M3 and the Mercedes-AMG C63, the top models of the two iconic manufacturers, are in eternal competition. With the Lexus RC F, a competitor from Japan is lurking. Is the Japanese exotic a threat to the German competition?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Aston Martin Vanquish is timeless and carries the strongest engine of the British brand under its hood. Also: Arden gave a Jaguar a power treatment and transformed the F-Type R to their Arden AJ23. And: the Morgan AR P4 roadster.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: The Blacktrail by PG Bikes is the fastest and lightest E-bike in the world, but also the most expensive. What's behind this exciting power package from Regensburg, Germany? Also: is BMW's new flagship bike, the K 1600 GT with 6 cylinders really worth its price and is it able to stand up to the competition by Honda, Kawasaki and Benelli?

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Whether taking it easy and cruising, or firing it up and drifting - trikes, scooters and three-wheeled bike conversions all have their own charm and driving dynamics, especially the trikes. We take a closer look at four rather exotic motorcycles: the Rewaco RF1 Turbo, Piaggio's MP3 and bike conversions for the Suzuki 800 Intruder and the Triumph Rocket III Touring.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Preview
programme.desc: Since it was first set up back in 2014, the GC32 Racing Tour has become one of the most sought after for those who enjoy sailing at its finest and fastest. The 2021’s season again proved why the world’s top professional and amateurs love this tour!After a challenging 2020, when the Tour was cancelled, it finally returned better than ever and made 2021 a year to remember. Through the season, the four stops offered nail-biting action in breath taking venues that brought the best out of these dynamic and fast one design foiling catamarans.The level of expectation and the anticipation was extremely high when the owner-driver and commercially-backed professional teams were about to hit again the water and both the organizers and the participants proved that it was worth waiting for the comeback. So let’s remember the most notable moments of what was a fascinating season full of top-level sailing battles in some crystal clear blue waters.

programme.title: Les Voiles de Saint Tropez - Episode 1 - Portrait of Les Voiles De St Tropez
programme.desc: Welcome to the 20th edition of Les Voiles de St. Tropez. The legendary bay of Brigitte Bardot is home one more time to one of the most glamorous regattas in the world. Here, more than 200 Classic and modern yachts sail side by side in the golden Saint Tropez to win this delightful competition.

programme.title: Discovering Watersports On Terceira
programme.desc: Terceira, on the Azores Islands, is a nautical sporting paradise for many. From pro surfers to passionate sailors, we dive into the lives of local athletes that are fortunate to call this island home.Discovering Watersports On Terceira joins athletes from different categories on their nautical challenges on their way to excellence. However, it also centers on the human aspect, checking on secret spots used by these water enthusiasts as well as lifestyle in the Azores Islands.Join us in their adventure, here on Nautical Channel.

programme.desc: A secluded cottage is plagued by a series of gruesome murders, unbeknownst to the inhabitants something other worldly lurks within the halls.

programme.title: Beware the Boogeyman
programme.desc: Dr. Tristian Mackenzie makes her way to a Psychiatric Hospital for the criminally insane, where she learns of the strange series of cases from Dr. Moon.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S04:E07 - Swimming with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Manny swims with giant gulf sturgeon on the Suwanee River.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S04:E08 - Snapping Turtles of the Santa Fe
programme.desc: Manny explores the Santa Fe River in search of alligator, snapping turtles other wildlife.

programme.desc: Manny hunts wild eurasian boars with a spear, both day and night. Oh - and Manny gets bitten by his best friend!

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E09 - Bighorn Range
programme.desc: Bighorn sheep are captured and translocated in the mountains of Nevada.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E18 - The Queen Mother An Affectionate Tribute
programme.desc: The Queen Mother, who lived as long as the century itself, was a beloved figure in British life. She was a symbol of bravery during the Second World War and a timeless icon of steadiness, winning a deep affection from people that was only matched by the Queen herself.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E25 - Kate The Making Of A Modern Queen
programme.desc: A look at the Duchess of Cambridge's journey from being an everyday young woman to becoming a future queen, and what her evolution signifies for the royal family.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E12 - The Last Hunters
programme.desc: Arctic Pt3. The Inuit take Jim and Corey on their last adventure together. Jim finds inspiration from empty stretches of broken ice and the people who live off it.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E03 - Chasing The Big One
programme.desc: Montana wardens spend a week tracking the killer of two out-of-season deer; anonymous tips and eye witness accounts keep the wardens hot on a trail filled with many twists and turns.

programme.title: Youth Topia
programme.desc: In a world driven by algorithms, a group of "forever teenagers" rebel against the dictates of self-optimization.

programme.title: Burning Beds

programme.title: The Power To Change Your Mind
programme.desc: God created us to look like a reflection of His love, but many of us still wrestle with a history that contaminates that image. When we cope with facades, we miss out on the freedom God has for us. Bishop T.D. Jakes teaches us how to have the courage it takes for real transformation.

programme.title: Move In What You Are Made For
programme.desc: In “Move In What You’re Made For,” we learn to step out of insecurity and into our unique purpose.

programme.title: Blown Away

programme.title: The One Who Seeks... Finds!
programme.desc: In “The One Who Seeks… Finds!” we’re reminded that during difficult seasons, we can either look for reasons to grumble or reasons to hope.

programme.title: No Weapon
programme.desc: In “No Weapon,” we learn that when we don’t have the resources for the fight we’re facing, God’s power is more than enough.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Realizing that she has left her cell phone in a store, Adriana walks away from Tatiana and Patricia; just then, she runs into César Román, who immediately recognizes her.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Carlos Raúl tells Mauricio that, despite being discovered by Adriana in his plan to capture César, he will not lose heart in conquering the young woman's heart.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: They keep Julia kidnapped until Ezequiel begs for the safe return of his daughter. Camila does not give up, she wants to know who El Doliente is and thinks it could be her mother because of the photo she received of the girl in the yellow dress.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max, impatient, wants to know about his sister, Julia. Their plan is to exchange her for Ezequiel and then kill him. In a voice message Julia tells him the time and day of the exchange and Max will accompany him.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Carmen accuses Luis and Augusto of trafficking minors. Ricardo is cornered: on the one hand he feels he cannot maintain a relationship with four women at the same time, but on the other hand there is the million dollars lost. Gertrudis celebrates that the success in the drug trafficker's trial opens the door for all of them to trust her Legal Office. Alberto is leaving the Corona house when Guillermo intercepts him on his motorcycle; threatening, he lifts the visor of his helmet and is exposed to his rival.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Alberto asks for police protection for his home and family; Omar comes to the conclusion that Claudio is indeed involved in his brother's death - Patricia does not understand why Gertrudis insists on condemning her daughter to a relationship with a troglodyte like Pablo - Alberto tells his mother about the encounter he had with the hitman who killed his father; Gertrudis feigns anger and surprise, immediately calling Claudio to alert him about the situation

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel propone reunirse en una cena con Camila para decirle que va a sacar de la carcel a "su mamá". La Madre Isabel sólo quiere que Camila sea feliz y para eso le recomienda que forme una familia.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila está feliz pués su madre, al fin, está libre, pero Max sigue dudando. Reunidas, quiere saber porqué la abandonó la mujer finge no recordar esos momentos dolorosos. La abandona por segunda vez. Es un golpe muy fuerte.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Gregorio necesita escapar con Julia. Camila esta negada al amor, Jeli quiere que admita lo que siente por Max y ella le cuenta la razón del rechazo. En el orfanato habla con el Padre Tiziano y la Madre Isabel sobre Rosa Blanco; y cree que tiene que ver en este asunto y que es El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Esperanza, sabe sobre Rosa Blanco. Gregorio y Julia, fingen ante la familia, pero continúan encontrándose. Los Aragón siempre en guerra por la muerte de Marcos.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Gregorio necesita escapar con Julia. Camila esta negada al amor, Jeli quiere que admita lo que siente por Max y ella le cuenta la razón del rechazo. En el orfanato habla con el Padre Tiziano y la Madre Isabel sobre Rosa Blanco; y cree que tiene que ver en este asunto y que es El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max piensa que Camila lo rechazó por Roberto. En confesión con el Padre Tiziano, le aconseja que le cuente toda la verdad a Max, pero ella teme que Roberto la denuncie por asesina. Julia y Gregorio vuelven a encontrarse.

programme.title: Añoranzas de mi Madre
programme.desc: Ana, una mujer ambiciosa, arrogante y sin escrúpulos ha perdido el verdadero significado de la vida, de los sentimientos y de la Naturaleza misma.

programme.title: Utopía 7
programme.desc: En un mundo postapocalíptico, una pandilla de jóvenes rebeldes lucha contra los mecanismos de alta tecnología de un sistema informático definitivo que había sido encargado por un grupo de élite para restablecer el orden y el equilibrio.

programme.title: Expediente 53
programme.desc: Esta es una historia de misterio y acción en la ciudad de Bryan Texas el comandante Gatel pide la ayuda del FBI ya que hay muchos desaparecidos, y asesinatos en la ciudad. Los agentes Gutiérrez, Bracho y Miravalle del FBI le comentan al comandante Gatel que ellos sospechan que puede ser obra de una secta satánica y que el líder es un demonio de nombre Abal que está en el cuerpo de una bella mujer de nombre Lilly.

programme.title: Cuernavaca
programme.desc: El mundo de Andy cambia totalmente cuando su madre tiene un accidente. Sin nadie que lo cuide, es llevado a Cuernavaca, a la casa de su desconocida abuela paterna. Mientras su madre se debate entre la vida y la muerte, el niño se enfrentará a la frialdad de su abuela, al mundo seductor y peligroso del hijo del jardinero y a la búsqueda de su padre

programme.title: El Sonido de los Tulipanes
programme.desc: En Buenos Aires durante la crisis del 2001, Marcelo un escritor devenido en periodista, debe volver sobre los últimos pasos de su padre Tonio un consagrado intelectual de quien se encuentra profundamente distanciado cuando muere en condiciones extrañas. De la mano de Carolina la ex secretaria de su padre, Marcelo se sumerge en un mundo oscuro lleno de violencia y ambiciones de poder enfrentándose a “El Loco” Bertolini. Pero el peligro no solo lo acechará a él sino también a los suyos. ¿Podrá Marcelo encontrar los verdaderos motivos de la muerte de su padre?

programme.title: El Desertor
programme.desc: Luego de ser reclutado para el servicio militar y ante los abusos de su jefe inmediato, el Subteniente Montilla, Julián escapa del cuartel, lo que provoca una feroz persecución por parte de Montilla, quien se ha enamorado de Sagrario y hará todo lo posible para separar a los jóvenes.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.
